sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n93220" key="sa/ndanon" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σάνδανον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, perh. <sense id="n93220.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sandal-wood, Santalum album</tr_>, in pl., <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg016:142" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">16.142</biblScope> </bibl> (dub. sens., cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σαγάλινος</foreign>).</sense> </entryFree>
